name: Barbara Hannigan
abstract: Barbara Hannigan  (born 8 May 1971) is a Canadian soprano and conductor known for her performances of contemporary classical music. In 2025, she received the Polar Music Prize.

about_quotes.speaker: Lorraine Feather
about_quotes.evidence: So we wrote a 15-minute piece... and we recorded it and videotaped it with the BBC orchestra and Barbara conducting and singing.
